compiled_state.title: Tier C: retire bash compute (delete ticket-next-batch.sh + validate-issues.sh + REBAR_COMPUTE switch + dual-run wiring)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
Tier C retirement complete (step 7), commit 3567a2ff.
Deleted: ticket-next-batch.sh (954) + validate-issues.sh (945) + REBAR_COMPUTE switch + dispatcher _compute_python helper + both dual-impl arms + ticket_next_batch/ticket_validate bash wrappers. Library next_batch()/validate() always in-process. ~1,899 LOC bash + 12 heredocs gone; architecture.md offender table lost both compute rows.
Tests: dual-run parity suites translated to python-only characterization; .sh suites kept (exercise python dispatcher), zero-shell-harness deferred to Tier E (mirrors Tier B); transition-deleted redirected to dispatcher + python port.
Verify: bash suites 11/10/19, characterization 17/17, interfaces 262/262, isolated probe 141/141 against the bash-free build.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
